task_completion.description: Material Receipt is created for the ordered items and completed.

task_completion.description: Vendor Invoice is created matching the PO and completed.

task_completion.description: AP Payment is created for the full amount with the correct bank account and check number, and completed.

task_completion.description: Payment Allocation ties the payment to the invoice with zero outstanding balance.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Payment Allocation form or Allocation window showing the $1,860.00 Payment and Invoice for 'Tree Farm Inc.' linked, with a Difference of 0.00, and evidence of successful processing (e.g., success message or Document Status 'Completed').

privileged_info_for_vlm: Vendor: Tree Farm Inc. Products: Oak Tree (Qty: 25, Price: $36.00), Holly Bush (Qty: 40, Price: $24.00). Expected Grand Total: $1,860.00 (0% tax). Bank Account: MoneyBank 1234. Check Number: CHK-P2P-2026-001. Organization: HQ. All documents must be in 'Completed' status.
